commands.name: copy
commands.description: Copy the specified folder or file(s) as a smart template to the central registry

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the template to be created. Required when copying multiple files.

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Name of the folder or file(s) to copy as a smart template. For multiple files, separate paths with a comma.

commands.name: paste
commands.description: Paste the specified smart-template from the central registry

options.name: --to
options.description: The path where to paste the smart template file(s) and folders. If not specified, the file(s) will be pasted to the current directory. [default: <path>]

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove the specified template from the central registry

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of the template to be removed. If not specified, the file name will be used.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all templates in the central registry
